blockingFindings.evidence: `controller/creative.go:1969` 的 `creativeForbiddenRelayBodyNormalizedKey` 只对子串 `notifyhook/callback/webhook/...` 做包含匹配；`controller/creative.go:1995` 只列出精确 `selectedkey/xselectedkey/requestkey/xrequestkey`；`controller/creative.go:2002-2003` 只列出精确 `notify/notifyurl/.../owner/ownerid/user/userid`。本地复刻 normalizer 输出：`notificationUrl -> False`, `notifyEndpoint -> False`, `ownerOverride -> False`, `selectedKeyOverride -> False`, `x-selected-key-override -> False`。
blockingFindings.impact: Creative browser relay 仍可携带部分 notify/owner/selected-key 同义或后缀变体进入后续 relay/provider 请求路径，未满足“forbidden relay fields including notify/callback/webhook/owner/selected-key variants”的 fail-closed 目标。
blockingFindings.requiredFix: 把 relay field/header normalizer 扩展为与策略层一致的 deny 规则，至少包含 `notify`/`notificat`、`owner`、`user`、`selectedkey`、`requestkey`、`reqkey` 的子串或明确别名覆盖；为 header/query/json/form/multipart filename 以及 Suno/MJ submit 添加这些变体的回归测试。
blockingFindings.title: Relay forbidden-field normalizer still allows notify/owner/selected-key variants

branch: new2fly: master; new-api: feat/creative-embed; opentu: feat/creative-embed
commandsRun: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD / git rev-parse HEAD (all three repos)

rg/nl focused reads for controller/creative.go, relay/common/override.go, relay/channel/api_request.go, relay/relay_task.go, controller/video_proxy.go, service/task_polling.go, service/creative_asset.go, OpenTU workflow/audio submission files, release gate/runbook scripts
find dist trees for stats.html, *.map, sw-debug*, cdn-debug*
python3 static normalizer probe for notify/owner/selected-key variants
evidence: Release artifact gate passed: `[ok] Creative embedded artifact contract holds`; all three dist trees have 174 files and version provenance `gitCommit=f35a83102273bfa45c4e399639b2e4a0c2c9fc92`.

S3 timeout appears fixed in code: `service/creative_asset.go:160` reads `CREATIVE_ASSET_S3_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`; `service/creative_asset.go:782-790` clones the HTTP client and forces a finite timeout.
Owner/platform scoping appears present for video content: `controller/video_proxy.go:74-95` fetches by session user id and rejects disallowed platforms before content fetch.
Task submit non-OK raw body exposure appears fixed: `relay/relay_task.go:261-269` drains/closes limited body and returns only status text.
inconclusive: Focused Go tests and `--run-new-api-tests` could not execute in this read-only environment: `go: creating work dir: mkdir /tmp/go-build...: read-only file system`.
No live route/cloud/browser smoke was run because the request forbids network/provider calls.
`dynamic-workflow` codex-flow fanout was not run because it would invoke provider-backed agents and write workflow/journal files, conflicting with the current no provider/read-only constraints.

nonBlockingRisks.evidence: `git status --short --branch` shows dirty worktrees in all three repos; new-api/opentu contain many modified source and generated dist files, new2fly contains modified gate/runbook files and untracked Trellis task artifacts.
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: Before release, commit or otherwise freeze the exact candidate and rerun the gates from that immutable state.
nonBlockingRisks.title: Dirty worktrees reduce release reproducibility

nonBlockingRisks.evidence: `find` shows `sw-debug.html` and `cdn-debug.html` still exist in all three dist trees, but `nl` shows sanitized placeholder content and release gate passes.
nonBlockingRisks.mitigation: If the release contract is “no debug-named paths at all,” add `sw-debug.html` and `cdn-debug.html` to forbidden static-path existence checks; otherwise document that these are inert placeholders.
nonBlockingRisks.title: Debug-named placeholder files remain in dist

summary: 当前磁盘状态未通过最终安全目标：核心 blocker 是 relay forbidden-field normalizer 对若干 notify/owner/selected-key 变体仍未 fail-closed。dist 一致性/provenance gate 通过，S3 timeout、selected-key fail-closed、raw-body redaction、owner+platform scoping的已读代码证据整体正向，但测试 gate 受只读环境限制未能执行。
